title: Spicy Savory Argentinian Beef Pasta
description: A fermented and energizing Argentinian dish featuring chili powder and a pasta water emulsion, sugar free friendly. This dish combines the flavors of Argentina with a spicy kick.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium high heat and cook the beef strips until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, chili powder, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in 1 cup of pasta water and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to coat with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped parsley and shaved grana padano cheese.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional parsley and cheese if desired.
